notes: BIML produces ML risk frameworks including the original ML risk taxonomy (78 risks) and the LLM-specific risk framework (81 risks). Founded by Gary McGraw.

alternate_names: Architectural Risk Analysis of Machine Learning Systems
data.description: Taxonomy of 78 risks specific to machine learning systems, organized by ML pipeline stage.
data.notes: The original BIML risk taxonomy covering 78 risks across the ML pipeline. Risks are identified by BIML-NN format. No per-item URLs — risks are documented in the interactive tool and results page.

versions_available.note: Original ML risk taxonomy with 78 risks.

children.description: BIML ML risk identifier (e.g., BIML-01, BIML-42)

data.note: Conceptual taxonomy — no per-item URLs. Refer to the interactive explorer or results page for risk descriptions.

examples.note: First risk in BIML ML risk taxonomy

alternate_names: An Architectural Risk Analysis of Large Language Models
data.description: Taxonomy of 81 risks specific to Large Language Model systems.
data.notes: LLM-specific extension of the BIML risk taxonomy. 81 risks identified by BIML-LLM-NN format. Published as a research paper.

children.description: BIML LLM risk identifier (e.g., BIML-LLM-01, BIML-LLM-50)

data.note: Conceptual taxonomy — no per-item URLs. Refer to the LLM risk framework paper for risk descriptions.

examples.note: First risk in BIML LLM risk framework
